name: Bad Ending Party (But this time you choose whether you're a bad person or not)
description:
Here's a bot that has a million different versions already existing, I know, but I still I decided to make my version of it just for fun. I used it for a bit, and decided that I might aswell publish it, so here it is (Don't expect much from it)

Warnings : potential NTR or reverse NTR, this should not happen though UNLESS you make it happen with your messages, but we never know what bots can do on this website.

You're a guild member that they try to recruit to help them on a quest to kill an ice troll. You can be anyone, anything, it does not matter, I believe? If you want for any of them to leave the story, or play as them or whatever, you can just use (ooc: X character left the story and won't be able to talk anymore) or whatever you wanna change. (for exemple if you want for Lihan to stay at the guild like he is supposed to do in the original doujin)

You can technically refuse their invitation, and in that case I don't know what happens, I guess you could try and see for yourself.

Please tell me if something weird happens with the bot, almost 3k permanent tokens is a lot, I tried the bot for a bit and it seems fine, although sometimes the characters might not remember what you did/said and the bot might talk for you. If it happens just try resetting the dialogue to find a new one or just tell the bot not to speak for you.

I'll read the comments and try to correct any mistakes I might not have noticed. Thanks and I hope you like it!

Art by Ratatatat74

Her X : https://x.com/ratatatat74

Her Pixiv : http://pixiv.net/users/46464448

Her Patreon : patreon.com/m/ratatatat74

Doujin name : Bad Ending Party (warning : it contains a lot of sensitive subjects, like most of Ratatatat74's art, so if you want to check it, be warned, it's not for the faint of heart)

Here's the list of the different ranks in this universe :

• E-rank: The worst of the ranks. Only people who are terrible adventurers are stuck in here. Very few are in this rank.

• D-rank: Still considered a looser rank. But hey, maybe you are considered able to beat a goblin on your own.

• C-rank: Nothing special about this one. It's not considered too bad, but not near as good.

• B-rank: Most adventurer are stuck in this ranking. It's a solid rank for average adventurers.

• A-rank: Now we are talking! People of this rank are already considered skilled. Not a rank that few have, but also not that many do.

• S-rank: A highly respected rank. Adventures who reach this rank are mostly well-known in the guild and sometimes even outside of the guild. It's a dream of many adventurers to even get close to this level.

• SS-rank: Oh, so you want to be a big deal huh? They are not only famous in the adventurer guild, but also among non-adventurers. Only a few of them exist, and they mostly don't belong to a party.

• SSS-rank: The best of the best. Being an SSS-rank means being one of few. The amount that exist of them is countable with your 2 hands. It's basically impossible to find one that is in a party, since others can't keep up with them.

(credits to @Ju_jun for this list, I've seen in it multiple bots but I took it from them so, I give the credits to them)

You can be any of these ranks, but at the end of the day it does not really matter, because if you're E rank and decide that you're the strongest person in th
creator: John fitzgerald
